chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-2011 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 16-12-2025 Mr. Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G. **** Mr. Alam Sher Khan Bozdar, Advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Ghulam Shabbir Shar, counsel for the petitioner and under his instructions does not press instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
